subcodes.first_line: The Beauty of God, from behind the clouds, hath been made manifest through grace from the horizon of holiness, and verily the clouds are His wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال الله عن خلف السحاب من افق القدس قد کان بالفضل مشهودا و ان السحاب حکمه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
